free_text: Measurement of the neutron-induced fission cross
section of 230Th at the CERN nTOF facility
Neutrons produced by spallation of a Pb target
by a pulsed beam of 20 GeV/c protons
Target ID Mass (mg) Activity (MBq)  # of nuclei(E+19)
The correct uncertainties are those of the activities
We decided to release the data up to 30 MeV.
